core_mechanism: a closed-loop predictive-control (active-inference) scheme in which an internal generative dynamical model produces predictions and self-generated actions feed back to align/entrain the internal dynamics with the external environment, bootstrapping the model through interaction rather than passive fitting
brief_reason: The abstract centers on intrinsic dynamics as the foundation for learning, the centrality of action in aligning those dynamics with the external world, and the distinction between self- and world-generated outcomes, which together describe an action-driven closed-loop predictive/control coupling between an internal model and its environment.
